programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Netherlands meets Morocco in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Monterrey Stadium. Netherlands ranked first after defeating Tunisia 3-1 in the final Group F match. Morocco ranked second in Group C after a 4-2 win against Haiti.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Belgium faces Senegal in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Seattle Stadium. Senegal finished third in Group I after defeating Iraq 5-0. Belgium ranked first after defeating New Zealand by a 5-1 margin to close out their Group G play.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: The first FIFA World Cup Group H match between Spain and Cabo Verde takes place at Atlanta Stadium. Cabo Verde makes a historic debut by participating in the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their first game is against the 2024 UEFA Euro champions.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Mexico faces England in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Mexico City Stadium. Mexico defeated Ecuador 2-0 with goals scored by Raul Jimenez and Julian Quinones. England won against Congo DR 2-1 with both goals scored by Harry Kane.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina faces Cabo Verde in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. Cabo Verde finished second in Group H after a 0-0 draw with Saudi Arabia. Argentina ranked first following a 3-1 win over Jordan in their final Group J match.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Belgium and Spain meet in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Los Angeles Stadium. Spain beat Portugal 1-0 behind a stoppage-time goal from midfielder Mikel Merino. Belgium dominated USA 4-1 in which forward Charles De Ketelaere netted a brace.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina meets England in a semi-final match of the FIFA World Cup at Atlanta Stadium. Argentina overcame Switzerland 3-1, Lautaro Martínez scored the final goal to seal the win. Jude Bellingham scored a brace in England's 2-1 victory over Norway.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: France faces Spain in a semi-final match of the FIFA World Cup at Dallas Stadium. France beat Morocco 2-0 behind Kylian Mbappe's opener, marking his eighth World Cup goal. Spain defeated Belgium 2-1 after Mikel Merino scored in the 88th minute.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: The United States and Paraguay compete in the first match of Group D in the FIFA World Cup. Weston McKennie leads the United States squad while Paraguay features midfielder Diego Gomez. The United States plays at home in Los Angeles.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Norway and England meet in the FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Miami Stadium. Norway beat Brazil 2-1 behind Erling Haaland's late brace, while England defeated Mexico 3-2 behind Jude Bellingham's brace and Harry Kane's clutch penalty sealed the win.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina plays Spain in the Final match of the FIFA World Cup at New York New Jersey Stadium. Spain secured a 2-0 shutout over France to advance to the finals. Lionel Messi assisted the winning goal in Argentina's 2-1 victory over England.

programme.title: Gerak Khas The Movie 1
programme.desc: Unit Gerak Khas ditugaskan untuk menghancurkan satu sindiket yang terlibat dalam kegiatan pengedaran VCD lucah dan pil ecstacy yang didalangi oleh dua kumpulan haram yang bermusuh.

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Komplot
programme.desc: Apabila anak saudaranya diculik, Zali cuba untuk membantu namun dia mula mengesyaki ada sesuatu yang tidak kena mengenai kes penculikan tersebut...

programme.title: Cuci the Movie
programme.desc: 4 rakan yang bekerja sebagai tukang bersih mencabar diri untuk membersihkan bangunan tertinggi di Malaysia, KLCC. Mereka mesti bersaing untuk mendapatkan peluang itu, bolehkah mereka menang?

programme.title: Cicakman 3
programme.desc: Man terpaksa mempertahankan gelaran wiranya apabila dia menyedari ada wira baharu ingin menggantikan tempatnya.

programme.title: Cupcake Mama
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Hanna, isteri dan ibu yang bosan dengan rutin hidup. Dorongan keluarga membawa dia memulakan perniagaan cupcake dari rumah, sambil mengimbangi peranan sebagai isteri, ibu dan usahawan.

programme.title: Puyah & Putat
programme.desc: Kisah pengembaraan Puyah, seorang gadis kampung becok yang disukai ramai, apabila dia melawat Kuala Lumpur dan termasuk set filem secara tak sengaja, dan tak semena-mena mula mendapat nama sebagai pelakon.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih Ep06
programme.desc: Work pressure and office gossip escalate in Adelia's life. Although she and Hana become closer, her hallucinations of Haoyu threaten the bond.

programme.title: Mael Lambong
programme.desc: Mael Lambong merupakan seorang penarik kereta terkenal di Kuala Lumpur. Kehidupannya mula menjadi huru-hara setelah berjumpa dengan Maria yang meminta bantuannya untuk mengelak dari penjahat yang mengejarnya.

programme.title: Bukan Cerita Cinta Cliche
programme.desc: Seorang penulis skrip kisah-kisah cinta tetapi masih bersendirian mengimpikan cinta dalam kehidupan realitinya, lalu dia menyertai sebuah kumpulan terapi untuk berkongsi masalah peribadinya.

programme.title: Senario The Movie Episod 2 Beach Boys
programme.desc: The Beach Boys - Azlee, Mazlan dan Wahid kembali untuk menyempurnakan misi mereka menyelamatkan sebuah resort yang hampir ditutup.

programme.title: Tuah
programme.desc: Hang Tuah yang telah hilang kerana mengembara ke masa hadapan pulang semula ke zaman asalnya untuk menyekat tindakan Hang Jebat dari menderhaka dan membunuh Sultan Melaka.

programme.title: Seandainya Kau Ada
programme.desc: Pasangan kekasih berpisah tatkala lelaki yang dikasihi pergi melanjutkan pelajaran. Dia berjanji akan mengahwini pasangannya bila dia kembali. Tetapi terhalang setelah dia temui perenpuan lain.

programme.title: Main-Main Hantu
programme.desc: Sekumpulan pemain bola jaring dan guru terkandas dalam perjalanan ke Melaka akibat bas rosak. Mereka menumpang sebuah rumah usang dan kejadian misteri mula berlaku.

programme.title: Suamiku Encik Perfect 10

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Buns and Blossom make gifts for their grandmas; on Park Appreciation Day, Buns reminds her friends about the power of teamwork; Buns helps Neil get to his birthday party on time.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Shirley Shawn the Unicorn and Tsehay are in the Wiggly Kitchen; they sing along to the Wiggly favorite Hot Potato, then the Wiggle Town Dancing Water Police arrive to help.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from a hot-rod in Mel's dad's garage, Barney helps the kids make their own magical hot rod-style race cars.

programme.title: Miss Persona
programme.desc: Major Joe and Brandon have a fierce game of tic-tac-toe; when Joe wins, he celebrates for a very long time; this makes Brandon feel bad, so referee Miss Persona tries to show Joe that his gloating is hurting Brandon's feelings.

programme.title: Toon Bops
programme.desc: The elves and reindeer dance and sing as they get Santa's sleigh ready for the big day.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig races to raise money for the school; Peppa and George go on a boat trip with Grandpa Pig; Delphine goes to Playgroup to learn the "Bing Bong Song.".

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove; Surf's up for Rubble & Crew, if they can get over the super hot sand.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Bam must learn to adapt and try something new as he's tasked to drive the Bat Big Rig all the way to Star City, while the Legion of Zoom chases after him.

programme.title: Bugs Bunny Builders
programme.desc: The Looney Builders build a science museum in the desert where Wile E. Coyote becomes distracted by the Road Runner.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go
programme.desc: When Nia causes an accident that sends sand into Tess's gears during a big delivery, Nia tries Sandy's new super-grease as a solution; the engines are excited to see the Northern Lights with Harold the Helicopter.

programme.title: Agent Binky: Pets of the Universe
programme.desc: The team tries to quickly come up with new acts after they realize that they had forgotten about the upcoming talent show; Gordon creates a "time machine" to go back into the past so that he can enjoy yesterday's breakfast again.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove; after a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: Hamsters of Hamsterdale
programme.desc: A motley crew of hamsters mistake their 8-year-old owner Harry as their King and beloved ruler of their elaborate, colorful-tubed kingdom.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: A narwhal gets his horn stuck in an ice chunk.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway's big plans for Chicken Day become threatened when the Chicken of Honor, Chickaletta, mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rose's favorite old tree might be off limits to climb, Rubble and Grandpa come up with a solution.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: It's a very happy day in Wiggle Town as John and Lachy are in the Wiggly Kitchen and find a flower with yellow petals, but they're not sure what flower it could be.

programme.title: Max & Ruby
programme.desc: Max and his friends want to play a game, but they can't figure out which one; Max realizes that he needs to work on his basketball game.

programme.title: THE SULTAN
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a grand talk show featuring 'King Sultan' Andre Taulany and 'Prince' Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a hilarious squad of royal guards. With spectacular guest stars and non-stop entertainment, this is one regal spectacle you definitely don't want to miss!

programme.title: AMAZING STAYCATION
programme.desc: A semi-documentary about the ongoing trend nowadays during the covid 19 situation, which is staycation and the variety of the activities.

programme.title: ILHAMI
programme.desc: A variety of news and developments of current events from Indonesia and abroad, complemented by the study of leading ustadz from an Islamic point of view on issues that are in the public spotlight.

programme.title: Walau Bukan Jodoh Udah Sambungin Aja
programme.desc: Tari (Rachquel Nesia) heard that her boss’s son was working at her office. Tari thought her boss’s son was Langit (Alex Rio), not Gala (Kevin Hillers), because there was no way her boss would have his son work as an office boy.

programme.title: Getuk Dangdut Pembawa Asmara Gak Rugi Doong
programme.desc: Kiara (Ciara Brosnan) ran away from home because she was angry and embarrassed to have an aunt, Ghita (Shanice Margaretha), who sells getuk. While Ghita was searching for Kiara, she was helped by Yudi (Rizky Fachrel), a handsome teacher at Kiara’s school.

programme.title: Istilah Kata Mah Saling Cosplay Jadi Pacar Aja
programme.desc: Constantly pressured by his parents, Arya (EL RYAN CARLEN) decides to take the plunge and confess his feelings to Diana, but it turns out Diana is picked up by her boyfriend instead. Arya is heartbroken. He finally decides to pretend he has a girlfriend.

programme.title: Dunia Tipu Tipu, Ujungnya Tetep I Lop U
programme.desc: It’s said that Acha and Daffa’s pre-wedding photoshoot suddenly fell through because Daffa was already seeing another girl. Later, on her younger sister’s advice, Acha decided to go ahead with the pre-wedding photoshoot with another man named Mamat. Mamat got a makeover to look like a Westerner.

programme.desc: Kala, a young rocker who dreams of becoming a musician, is forced to live in a village after his father sends him there. There, he meets Asih, a beautiful village girl who is the daughter of the caretaker of the villa owned by Kala’s father. Kala is instantly smitten by Asih, who is not only beautiful but also kind-hearted.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep04

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep05

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep06
programme.desc: Aera disedut ke dalam buku sebagai Si Tudung Merah. Dia berangkat melawat Nek Kura tetapi bertemu dengan Serigala. Serigala segera menculik Nek Kura, menyamar sebagai dirinya, dan menunggu ketibaan Aera.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep07
programme.desc: Nana menyelamatkan Aera tetapi terperangkap dalam buku. Di dalamnya, dia bertemu seekor Tikus yang ditangkap oleh Singa. Nana cuba meredakan keadaan dan meyakinkan Singa untuk melepaskan Tikus itu.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep08
programme.desc: Jojo tersedut ke dalam buku dan bertemu Nana serta Rubah. Mereka lihat Singa mengumpan haiwan ke gua tanpa ada yang keluar. Curiga, mereka merancang misi menyelamat, namun sesuatu tak dijangka berlaku.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep03
programme.desc: Didi dan kawan-kawannya beraksi sebagai pasukan bola sepak menentang pasukan yang hebat. Namun Nana, Jojo dan Aera masih belum mahir, menyebabkan Didi nekad bertindak sendirian di padang.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 24
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 129
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 51
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 25
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 25
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. She is forced to pretend to be in a relationship with Sena, a ketoprak street vendor. programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 98
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.title: City Lights
programme.desc: The Tramp falls in love with a girl with visual impairment who sells flowers on the street. He tries to help her gain her eyesight back with the help of a wealthy man.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Johnny English, a bumbling British agent, teams up with an Interpol agent and attempts to locate a French billionaire who has stolen the crown jewels.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

programme.title: Kung Fu Hustle
programme.desc: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: After Paris, a Trojan prince, has an affair with Menelaus's wife, Helen, he decides to take her with him. Later, Menelaus's brother uses that as an excuse to wage a war against the city of Troy.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Following IMF's assimilation into the CIA, Ethan Hunt and his team face a new challenge from the Syndicate, an international rogue group determined to destroy their organisation.

programme.title: Man of Tai Chi
programme.desc: Tiger Chen, a young martial artist, has unparalleled Tai Chi skills which lands him in a highly lucrative underworld fight club.

programme.desc: Sumathi raises her daughters, Thenmozhi and Meenakshi, with values. Thenmozhi marries into Mano's debt-ridden family. But, to protect Thenmozhi and restore the family's dignity, Meenakshi weds Jeeva.

programme.title: 7 Naatkal
programme.desc: Jennifer, a ballet dancer, is murdered and all evidence points to Siddharth as the perpetrator of the crime. Prasad, a crime branch officer, investigates the case to uncover the truth.

programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo have a magic xylophone that can freeze Dad in space and time, but Dad gains control and freezes Bluey instead.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: Mavis believes Aunt Lydia's behavior stems from loneliness and wants to help.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: The kids get trapped in a house.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: Mavis is the undisputed champion of phlemball until her cheating cousin Klaus arrives and convinces her to wager her father's golden fangs.

programme.title: Make It Pop
programme.desc: Sun Hi and Jodi stand up to Valerie and force Corki to run against her for homecoming queen; Caleb convinces Mr. Stark to let him be the homecoming DJ; Corki tries to get Jared to forgive her.

programme.title: Piranha 3D
programme.desc: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: Dylan secretly guides the Horsemen as they reappear with a bold plan, only to be drawn into a tech billionaire's twisted scheme involving a powerful data chip.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: Shrek falls for Princess Fiona when he embarks on a journey to rescue her in exchange for getting his swamp back from the fairytale-hating Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry.

programme.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: When in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max, a wanderer, joins the rebel warrior Imperator Furiosa against his will in order to dethrone an autocrat who controls water supply to the land.

programme.title: A Quiet Place Part II
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, Regan and her family learn that the alien predators can be defeated using high-frequency audio. Soon, armed with this knowledge, they set out to look for other survivors.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a barren island, a robot named Roz must rapidly adapt to the wild. It soon forms an unlikely parental bond with an orphaned gosling, finding connection in isolation.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: This powerful story of human courage and reconciliation in the face of titanic forces of nature, pits the world's most famous monster against malevolent creatures that threaten man's very existence.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Princess Diana of an all-female Amazonian race rescues US pilot Steve. Upon learning of a war, she ventures into the world of men to stop Ares, the god of war, from destroying mankind.

programme.title: GeneRIAsi Gap Ep03

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek Ep17

programme.title: Nikah, Cerai, Rujuk Ep04
programme.desc: Hanna mula insecure bila dapat tahu Adam berlakon dengan bekas kekasihnya dan mula fikir yang bukan-bukan. Dr Alia rasa seperti ada yang tak kena dengan Hisyam tapi dia hanya pendam perasaan tersebut.

programme.title: Perang Jantina Episod Akhir Ep08

programme.title: #expeRIAnce: Curi-Curi Cuti Ep05

Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 11
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: One On One - EP 10
programme.desc: A heart-to-heart talk that will reveal stories that have never been shared with celebrities in the country.

programme.title: Uncle Bos Mama - EP 6
programme.desc: To make up for his mistake, Josh tells Fish to take a day off from the children while he looks after them. However, he soon finds himself overwhelmed as the children begin running circles around him. Meanwhile, Haidir begins questioning Fish about Josh’s sudden involvement with the children.

programme.title: Dendam Aurora - EP 39
programme.desc: Aurora’s investigation into Dr. Azam’s death begins to strain her marriage to Harris. Meanwhile, Michael hesitates to blackmail Haikal over the case, knowing it could also implicate his own son, Andy.

programme.title: Mechamato S4 - EP 6
programme.desc: Amato and his friends embark on a desperate mission to find Deep’s missing younger sibling, only to stumble upon a mysterious dollhouse in the woods. Inside, they face strange challenges reminiscent of a twisted game show.

programme.title: Siapa Master? - EP 13
programme.desc: In this final episode, Chef Syed and Danial will be cooking all things beefy Steak & Potato Kebab, Beef Gyro and Thai Beef Salad. So will we finally uncover the Master between the two? You be the judge!

programme.title: Dendam Seorang Madu - EP 30
programme.desc: Nawfal goes missing, and Faris and Rayhana suspect Hanum and Izara are involved, but every lead ends in a dead end. Syaza’s suspicions about Hanum drive a wedge between her and Akif.

programme.title: (Live) Berita 2026/2027
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: In Alison's Mind
programme.desc: Alison Lim has early-onset dementia. Instead of giving up, she helps others with dementia, and their caregivers, live meaningful lives while combating the stigma surrounding the disease.

programme.title: Uncle Bos Mama - EP 7
programme.desc: Josh is forced by his father to accept Leona. Meanwhile, Maznah urges Haidir to forget Fish as he is set to be engaged to the woman of her choice. The news takes a toll on Fish’s health.

programme.title: Malang Si Puteri - EP 15
programme.desc: Mastura struggles with her forced marriage, feeling misunderstood and trapped. As her frustrations grow, she is reminded of Puteri, deepening her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Berita 2026/2027
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: End of Transmission
programme.desc: End of Transmission
